rationale: Pins the C1 runtime command contract as exactly `bun run doom.ts`. Decomposes the contract into the runtime program (`bun`), the runtime subcommand (`run`), and the workspace-root entry file (`doom.ts`) so downstream steps can cross-check the contract by part rather than by parsing README prose. Records that the entry file `doom.ts` does not yet exist on disk and that the current `package.json` start script (`bun run src/main.ts`) does not match the contract; the implementation gap is owned by step 03-002 wire-root-doom-ts-entrypoint.
